petition.default: Sawubona! Ngisanda kusayina le petishini futhi ngangicabanga ukuthi nawe ungayisekela.

email.subject: Ungasayina yini lesi sicelo nami?
email.body:
Sawubona,

Ngisanda kusayina isicelo mayelana nento engiyikhathalelayo kakhulu, futhi ngifinyelela kubantu engicabanga ukuthi bangase bafune ukusisekela naso.

Yonke isiginesha isiza ukwakha umfutho futhi ikhombisa abathathi-zinqumo ukuthi abantu bayakhathalela lolu daba. Kuthatha umzuzu owodwa kuphela ukungeza igama lakho:

{url}

Ngizokwazisa kakhulu ukwesekwa kwakho kulokhu. Ngiyabonga ngokuthatha isikhathi sakho ukucabangela lokhu!

Sawubona,

Ngisanda ukuthumela i-imeyili mayelana nodaba engilukhathalele, futhi bengifuna ukubona ukuthi uzohlanganyela nami ekwenzeni amazwi ethu azwakale.

Kukhona itempulethi esivele yabhalwa eyenza kube lula kakhulu - ungayenza yakho noma uyithumele njengoba injalo. Kuthatha imizuzu embalwa nje:

{url}

Lapho abantu abaningi bexhumana, kuba nzima kakhulu ukunganaki. Ungacabanga yini ukwengeza izwi lakho?

Ngiyabonga kakhulu
email.default: Sawubona! Ngisanda kuthumela umlayezo mayelana nalolu daba – ungacabanga yini ukwengeza izwi lakho? Kuyashesha kakhulu:

email.subject: Ungangijoyina ekusekeleni lo mkhankaso
email.body:
Sawubona,

Muva nje ngithathe isinyathelo ngento engiyikhathalelayo futhi bengifuna ukwabelana ngayo nawe. Ngicabanga ukuthi nawe ungase ube nentshisekelo yokubamba iqhaza.

Kuthatha imizuzu embalwa nje, futhi ngikholwa ukuthi kungaba nomthelela omkhulu. Nansi isixhumanisi uma ungathanda ukujoyina:

{url}

Ngiyabonga ngokucabangela lokhu!

share.default: Hey! Ngisanda ukuthatha isinyathelo entweni ebalulekile - ufuna ukungijoyina?
